Thuj..personality: The Thuja constitutional type is secretive and deceptive by nature, able to control themselves among strangers while showing their true irritable, quarrelsome temperament only to those closest to them. They are fundamentally dishonest in presentation, with a disposition to cheat, and prefer to be alone with their peculiar fixed ideas.
Thuj..mental_state: The Thuja mind is dominated by fixed ideas that cannot be reasoned away — delusions of pregnancy, of animals living inside the body, of being followed, or of someone walking alongside them. There is a striking sensation that soul and body are separated, and a belief that they are made of glass and will break. These mental symptoms intensify as ovarian or reproductive pathology deepens.
Thuj..emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of violent irritability, intense jealousy, and quarrelsomeness directed primarily at intimate family members — the husband or mother — while maintaining a controlled facade with outsiders. There is a deep desire for isolation and withdrawal, with hysteria emerging under the pressure of physical suffering, particularly during menstruation when pain can drive the patient to cry aloud.
